CloudWatchOutputDataConfig.documentation: CloudWatch Logs destination for batch evaluation results

evaluators.documentation: List of evaluators to run against sessions

insights.documentation: List of insight types to generate (e.g., FAILURE_ANALYSIS)

EvaluationConfiguration.documentation: Configuration specifying what analysis to run — evaluators, insights, or both

onlineEvaluationConfigSource.documentation: Reference an existing OnlineEvaluationConfig as session source

expectedResponse.documentation: expectedResponse for evaluation, reuses common model EvaluationContent

assertions.documentation: assertions for evaluation, reuses common model EvaluationContentList

expectedTrajectory.documentation: expectedTrajectory for evaluation, reuses common model EvaluationExpectedTrajectory

Insight.documentation: An insight analysis to run against sessions

OnlineEvaluationConfigSource.documentation: Session source that references an existing OnlineEvaluationConfig

RunSummaryEvaluationResults.documentation: Evaluation results summary for list responses (no session counts)

evaluationConfig.documentation: What analysis to run. Required for CW/S3/inline sources. Must have at least one of evaluators or insightTypes. Must not be provided when sessionSource is onlineEvaluationConfigSource (inherited from referenced config).
